documentText:
Subject: Re: Account Access Issue - Ticket #48291

Hi support team,

My name is Daniel Reyes and I'm having trouble logging into my account. I tried resetting my password but never received the reset email. Could you check if there's an issue tied to daniel.reyes88@gmail.com?

For reference, my account was created in March 2019, and I've been a customer for about five years now. My customer ID is CX-20394857.

If it's easier, you can reach me directly at (512) 555-0199 - I'm usually free in the afternoons. Alternatively, my assistant Maria Chen can help at maria.chen@outlook.com or (415) 555-0342.

I also noticed a charge of $245.00 from "Bright Horizon Consulting" on my last statement dated June 15, 2024 that I don't recognize. Could someone look into that?

My colleague Sarah Mitchell also experienced a similar issue last week and was told to contact support@brighthorizon.com for billing disputes.

I've CC'd my attorney James Patterson on this thread as well.

Thanks,
Daniel
